message.content:
You are working on branch `RECO-678-fix-require-object-params-style-copurchases` in `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service`.

The changes for RECO-678 are already made (require-object-params fixes for style-copurchases and frequently-bought-together modules). But there are ESLint warnings remaining that need to be fixed.

## Step 1: Check current ESLint warnings on the target files

```bash
npx eslint --max-warnings=0 \
  src/modules/db/style-copurchases/style-copurchases.service.ts \
  src/modules/db/style-copurchases/models/style-copurchase.model.ts \
  src/modules/cli/commands/populate-style-copurchases.command.ts \
  src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.service.ts \
  src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.controller.ts \
  src/modules/rest/email-recommendations/email-recommendations.service.ts \
  src/unit-tests/populate-style-copurchases.command.unit-spec.ts \
  test/frequently-bought-together.e2e-spec.ts \
  test/rest/email-recommendations.service.e2e-spec.ts
```

Known warnings to fix:
- `style-copurchases.service.ts`: `no-unnecessary-condition` at lines 26, 72
- `frequently-bought-together.controller.ts`: `no-unnecessary-condition` at lines 80-81
- `frequently-bought-together.service.ts`: `no-unnecessary-condition` at lines 67-68, 103, 258, 324-325, 471-472 and `no-unnecessary-type-parameters` at line 258

## Step 2: Fix ESLint warnings

Read each file and fix the warnings:

For `no-unnecessary-condition` with `??` and optional chaining:
- Remove the `??` operator or optional chain if it's not needed
- e.g., `foo?.bar ?? baz` → `foo.bar ?? baz` if foo is definitely non-null, or just `foo.bar` if bar is never null

For `no-unnecessary-type-parameters`:
- Remove unused generic type parameters from function signatures

Read the files at the specific line numbers to understand context before fixing.

## Step 3: Run tests

```bash
cd /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service && npm run test:unit 2>&1 | tail -50
```

If unit tests pass, then run e2e tests:
```bash
npm run test:e2e 2>&1 | tail -80
```

## Step 4: Verify ESLint clean

```bash
npx eslint --max-warnings=0 \
  src/modules/db/style-copurchases/style-copurchases.service.ts \
  src/modules/db/style-copurchases/models/style-copurchase.model.ts \
  src/modules/cli/commands/populate-style-copurchases.command.ts \
  src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.service.ts \
  src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.controller.ts \
  src/modules/rest/email-recommendations/email-recommendations.service.ts
```

## Step 5: Commit all changes

Stage all modified files and commit:
```bash
git add src/modules/cli/commands/populate-style-copurchases.command.ts \
  src/modules/db/style-copurchases/models/style-copurchase.model.ts \
  src/modules/db/style-copurchases/style-copurchases.service.ts \
  src/modules/rest/email-recommendations/email-recommendations.service.ts \
  src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.controller.ts \
  src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.service.ts \
  src/unit-tests/populate-style-copurchases.command.unit-spec.ts \
  test/frequently-bought-together.e2e-spec.ts \
  test/rest/email-recommendations.service.e2e-spec.ts
```

Commit message format: `RECO-678: fix require-object-params violations in style-copurchases and frequently-bought-together`

## Step 6: Push

```bash
git push -u origin RECO-678-fix-require-object-params-style-copurchases
```

## Step 7: Create PR

Use `gh pr create` targeting the base branch this branch was cut from. Check what branch this was cut from:
```bash
git log --oneline -5
git show-branch | grep '*' | grep -v "$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)" | head -1
```

The base branch should be `main` (check recent commits to confirm).

Create PR:
```bash
gh pr create --title "RECO-678: fix require-object-params violations in style-copurchases and frequently-bought-together" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Fix `custom-rules/require-object-params` ESLint violations in `style-copurchases` and `frequently-bought-together` modules
- Update all callers in `email-recommendations`, CLI commands, and test files
- All functions now use single object destructuring parameter pattern

## Files Changed
- `src/modules/db/style-copurchases/models/style-copurchase.model.ts`
- `src/modules/db/style-copurchases/style-copurchases.service.ts`
- `src/modules/cli/commands/populate-style-copurchases.command.ts`
- `src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.service.ts`
- `src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.controller.ts`
- `src/modules/rest/email-recommendations/email-recommendations.service.ts`
- `src/unit-tests/populate-style-copurchases.command.unit-spec.ts`
- `test/frequently-bought-together.e2e-spec.ts`
- `test/rest/email-recommendations.service.e2e-spec.ts`

## Test plan
- [ ] `npm run test:unit` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes
- [ ] `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` passes on all changed files

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
```

Return the PR URL when done.

IMPORTANT NOTES:
- Working directory: `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service`
- Current branch: `RECO-678-fix-require-object-params-style-copurchases`
- Do NOT branch from main - stay on current branch
- Fix ALL ESLint warnings before committing
- The `validate` function from `class-validator` should NOT be wrapped in object params - only custom functions need that
